positive: A vintage botanical sketch of a fantastical, oversized flower (e.g., a Moon Lily or Dragon Bloom). Rendered in the style of a scientific illustration plate from the Victorian era. Include detailed cross-section diagrams and delicate sepia tones, printed on aged parchment texture.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern colors, cartoon, digital painting
